content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across br_health.rs, br_process.rs, project.rs, service.rs, and success_reconciliation.rs. The implementation is solid: per-adapter UUID-keyed journal records replace the single-file marker with proper file-locking serialization (flock), legacy marker backward compatibility is preserved, sync_if_dirty returns structured SyncIfDirtyOutcome with recovered status-update metadata, claim_bead_in_br correctly uses recovered flush to avoid duplicate claims, and health checks in handle_propose_new_bead are correctly deferred to just before mutations (allowing read-only idempotent replays through). All 48 br_process tests pass, all 8 br_health tests pass, cargo clippy -D warnings is clean, cargo fmt --check passes, and nix build succeeded. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
